---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What workflow is broken or annoying today?**
<!-- The problem in plain English. The fix often becomes obvious once the problem is clear. -->


**What would the ideal experience look like?**
<!-- Describe how you'd want it to work, not necessarily how to build it. -->


**Anything you've already tried?**
<!-- Other apps, workarounds, settings combinations. Helps me see what bar to clear. -->


**Optional: how often would you use this?**
- [ ] Every session
- [ ] A few times a week
- [ ] Occasionally
- [ ] Just once / one-shot need
